case_summary: Hybrid solar inverter not switching to battery backup during load shedding; alarm code on the front panel.

ground_truth.notes: Tests routing to solar_inverter rather than db_board_tripping or load_shedding_surge. The user-named equipment (inverter) plus the specific symptom (failed backup transfer) should anchor to the solar subcategory.

inputs.user_text: Our hybrid solar inverter has stopped switching the house to battery during load shedding — the power just goes out like normal. The inverter is showing a flashing red alarm light and a code we don't recognise on the small screen. The batteries appear to have charge (the lights on them are green). Solar generation during the day still seems to be happening.
